creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Mon, December 17, 2007 10:54 pm, David Pilcher wrote:
>
> When running sysinstall, I get a core dump when attempting to install
> additional packages.
>>How-To-Repeat:
> Installed basic system with no packages.
>
> Internet works - can ftp places.
>
> Run sysinstall and select Configure/Packages.  Select FTP/Main Site/Assume
> Network is configured.
>
> sysintall core dumps when saying 'Located INDEX, now reading package data
> from it...'
>
> syslog:
>
> kernel: pid 1057 (sysinstall), uid 0: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)
>
> sysinstall.core exists.
>
>
> I wonder if this is because FreeBSD is running under VMWare 6.  Are there
> known incompatibilities?

There are no packages available for -B4 yet, we dont do them for
intermediate releases (or actually "test platforms"), so it is quite
possible that this is not working indeed.

CAn you provide more information on the sysinstall.core via the
information on
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html

Thanks
remko
